basics.name: Sebastian Selinger
basics.label: System Administrator · IT Consultant · QA Expert
basics.summary: IT professional with 10+ years of experience in system administration, IT consulting, and quality assurance. System Administrator at the University of Freiburg, owner of Selinger Consulting, and a long-time QA specialist for AAA games and enterprise VR/AR software. Based in Freiburg, available for projects across the DACH region.

work.name: University of Freiburg
work.summary: Operating and securing the IT infrastructure for 25,000+ users: server administration, networking, virtualization, and monitoring.

work.name: Viadux Einsatzleitsysteme OHG
work.summary: Analysis of the company and software situation, definition of test requirements, dependency checks, ticket/Git workflow proposals, internal wiki articles, and a documentation workshop.

work.name: Scientific Games
work.summary: Analysis and testing of billing and verification machines for state lotteries, including machine analysis and OCR-library testing.

work.name: realworld one GmbH
work.summary: Enterprise VR/AR testing (industry & academia), test plans and documentation with Xray/Confluence, deployment via Azure CI/CD, QA representative in the release taskforce. Lead tester for AR (HoloLens 2) and cross-platform communication interfaces.

work.name: realworld one GmbH
work.summary: Manual and semi-automated functional testing of VR/AR applications, bug tracking in Jira, localization with POEditor, interface between development team and stakeholders.

work.name: Private Assistance
work.summary: Everyday support, communication with authorities, emotional support in stressful situations, and assistance with monthly and quarterly goals.

work.name: VMC / Global Beta Test Network
work.summary: Project-based testing of multiplayer AAA games (Xbox, PlayStation, Switch, iOS, Android, Windows) and VR testing (HTC Vive, Valve Index, Oculus Rift S): ad-hoc, regression, backend-server, and UX testing.

work.name: XboxDev
work.summary: Founded and operate XboxDev.com: gaming-industry coverage, live coverage of devcom, GDC, and gamescom, website setup, event planning, research, and networking.

work.name: Ubisoft
work.summary: Testing of triple-A games, UX testing, and ad-hoc matchmaking testing.

work.name: Selinger Consulting
work.summary: IT consulting for private and small business clients: provisioning and maintenance of IT hardware and websites, domain/hosting management, web platforms, and B2B hardware projects (Plesk, Apache, Nginx, MariaDB, AWS S3, Cloudflare).

projects.name: XboxDev.com
projects.description: Gaming news portal — founded, edited, and operated

projects.name: RBTV.info
projects.description: Development & operation of a community platform

projects.name: Gamescom Countdown
projects.description: Automated event platform with Discord/Twitter bots

projects.name: Huskynarr.de
projects.description: Personal long-term web project with multiple redesigns
